channel.title: CyberNetSec - Supply Chain Attack
channel.description: Latest supply chain attack threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: TeamPCP Weaponizes npm with Malicious Bitwarden CLI in Sophisticated Supply Chain Attack
item.description:
A sophisticated supply chain attack targeting the npm ecosystem has been uncovered by Unit 42, attributed to the threat actor group TeamPCP. The attackers published a malicious package, `@bitwarden/cli` version `2026.4.0`, which perfectly impersonates the legitimate Bitwarden command-line tool. Upon...

Severity: High

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Malware, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Critical GitHub RCE Flaw (CVE-2026-3854) Allowed Full Server Compromise via Single 'git push'
item.description:
A critical remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability in GitHub, tracked as CVE-2026-3854, has been disclosed by security firm Wiz. The flaw allowed any authenticated user with push access to a repository to execute arbitrary commands on GitHub's backend servers using a specially crafted `git push` c...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Supply Chain Attack, Cloud Security

Read Full Article →

item.title: Entertainment Industry Failing on Security Basics, MPA Report Reveals Widespread Risks
item.description:
The Motion Picture Association's (MPA) Trusted Partner Network (TPN) has released its first TPN STAR Report, revealing systemic security vulnerabilities across the global entertainment supply chain. The report finds that while most organizations have security policies, inconsistent execution of basi...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Policy and Compliance, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: GlassWorm Campaign Evolves, Uses Zig-Based Dropper to Infect All Developer IDEs
item.description:
The ongoing GlassWorm cyber-espionage campaign has adopted a new, sophisticated tool: a dropper written in the Zig programming language. This new malware component was discovered hidden within a malicious Open VSX extension masquerading as a legitimate WakaTime activity tracker. The dropper's primar...

Severity: High

Categories: Malware, Supply Chain Attack, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Critical Unpatched RCE Flaw in Hugging Face's LeRobot AI Platform Puts Robotics Systems at Risk
item.description:
A critical, unpatched remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-25874 with a CVSS score of 9.3, has been discovered in Hugging Face's popular open-source robotics platform, LeRobot. The flaw stems from an insecure data deserialization practice using `pickle.loads()` over unauthe...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Supply Chain Attack

Read Full Article →

item.title: AI-Driven Attacks Fueling MSP Supply Chain Risk, Guardz Report Finds
item.description:
A new report from cybersecurity firm Guardz reveals a grim reality for SMBs, with nine out of ten having compromised users, largely due to AI-accelerated attacks. The 2026 State of MSP Threat Report highlights a massive surge in losses from Business Email Compromise (BEC) and identifies the abuse of...

Severity: High

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Threat Intelligence, Malware

Read Full Article →

item.title: Checkmarx Details Supply Chain Attack Stemming from Trivy Scanner Vulnerability
item.description:
Application security firm Checkmarx has provided a detailed timeline of a supply chain attack that began with the exploitation of a vulnerability in the Trivy scanner. The attack, which started on March 23, 2026, led to unauthorized access to Checkmarx's GitHub environment. Attackers published malic...

Severity: High

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Data Breach, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Cyber Sovereignty and Supply Chain Risk Become Top Concerns for Critical Infrastructure
item.description:
Amid rising geopolitical tensions, the concepts of cyber sovereignty and supply chain security have become paramount for critical infrastructure operators. The recognition that any third-party vendor can be a weak link exploited by adversaries is driving a strategic shift away from cost-based sourci...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Policy and Compliance, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Global Wings Airline Breach Exposes Personal Data of 5 Million Passengers via Third-Party Vendor
item.description:
Global Wings Airline has disclosed a major data breach affecting approximately 5 million of its passengers. The breach originated not within the airline's own systems, but from a third-party service provider responsible for managing the 'SkyMiles' loyalty program database. The exposed data includes ...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Supply Chain Attack, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Log4j Deja Vu: Critical RCE Flaw in 'LogSpresso' Library Averts Major Supply Chain Crisis
item.description:
A potential Log4j-level crisis has been averted with the emergency patching of CVE-2026-23456, a critical (10.0 CVSS) remote code execution vulnerability in the popular open-source Java logging library 'LogSpresso'. Discovered by researchers at Checkmarx, the flaw was alarmingly similar to the infam...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Supply Chain Attack, Patch Management

Read Full Article →
